steps.title: Use the calmer-waters clue
steps.content: Kelp forests slow powerful, rough currents. The next phrase defines the environment created by that slowing as one with calmer waters where animals can shelter.

steps.title: Reject the wrong tones
steps.content: B contradicts the shelter context. C is unrelated because the environment is not being described as creative. D suggests something unexpected, while the passage describes a direct effect of slower currents. The answer is A.
